source_intake_record.raw_question_text: To reduce the 120 Hz hum emitted by the power supply rectifier, a "smoothing filter" can be used. Its simplest construction is formed by a resistor and a capacitor connected in series, as shown in Figure. If the applied voltage has a DC component $V_{\text{DC}}$, and a component with frequency 120 Hz and amplitude $V_{\text{AC}}$. Find the corresponding voltage $V'_{\text{DC}}$, $C = 10 \, \mu \text{F}$.)
